description: Volume evaluation dataset for VRIA CI release gate. Generated from anonymized data shapes matching internal/99 inventory patterns. Status strings and messy data shapes are real; use-case identities are anonymized.

records.label_notes: NotReady: no value owner, everything else present
NotReady: no value owner, no sponsor
NotReady: value owner empty string (whitespace treated as empty by engine)
NotReady: policy issue unresolved forces score to 0 and NotReady via owner empty check
HypothesisOnly: owner set, no metric ID, not delivery complete
HypothesisOnly: owner + objective + sponsor but no metric, no baseline
HypothesisOnly: owner set, metric ID present but baseline is nil
HypothesisOnly: training phase pattern from internal/99, owner set, no metric
BaselineReady: owner, metric, baseline all set; no current value
BaselineReady: baseline set, target set, no current value; financial benefit netvalue unknown
BaselineReady: target is null but baseline exists and current exists
BaselineReady: all fields set except current value; Authoritative, Fresh
OnTrack: partial progress p>0, not financial, NetNA, fully authoritative
OnTrack: 30% progress, Productivity benefit, net positive
OnTrack: 60% progress, MatchedComparison attribution, Aging freshness
OnTrack: 75% progress, Cost benefit, net positive, approved plan
AtRisk: p>0 but financial benefit with NetUnknown
AtRisk: p=0 (current == baseline), NetPositive, non-financial
AtRisk: NetNegative with partial progress
AtRisk: target reached but no approval (realizedEligible fails on ArtifactState)
Realized: all gates met — authoritative, fresh, direct measurement, net positive, approved
Realized: published artifact, A/B comparison, operational benefit
Realized: matched comparison, confounder documented, approved
Realized: tool tier, direct measurement, all gates passed
NotRealized: target hit but net value is negative (GE-015 pattern)
NotRealized: gross target reached, net negative, agent tier
NotRealized: target exceeded, net negative, layer tier, published
NotRealized: p>=1, net negative — ensures Fix not Scale
Regressed: sustainment=Regressed overrides all other state checks
Regressed: two consecutive sustainment failures, agent tier
Regressed: layer tier, published, sustainment regressed
Regressed: tool tier, minimal fields, sustainment regressed
Unproven: HasValueClaim=true and HasEvidenceSource=false (GE-005 pattern)
Unproven: delivery complete but no metric ID and no evidence source (GE-008 pattern)
Unproven: claim with no evidence source, layer tier
Unproven: deployment complete, no metric, DeliveryComplete=true, HasValueClaim=false
Malformed: null baseline, null current, null target, empty strings everywhere
Malformed: policy issue unresolved, all nulls — score forced to 0
Malformed: stale evidence without owner acceptance, no current value
Malformed: material confounders undocumented; scoring caps at 74
OnTrack: Tier=Layer, no sponsor — NeedsSponsor fires for Layer tier with no sponsor regardless of other fields
HypothesisOnly: Tier=Layer, no sponsor, no metric — NeedsSponsor
AtRisk: sustainment at_risk but state was heading toward realized
Realized: Tier=Tool, Productivity, before-after with confounders documented, approved
OnTrack: 50% progress, BeforeAfter attribution, Fresh, net positive
HypothesisOnly: only business objective set; no owner, no metric — check owner first
AtRisk: Revenue benefit, p>0 but NetUnknown (financial claim without net check)
BaselineReady: baseline present, current null, target set, Stale evidence
Unproven: PTO approved delivery complete, no metric (GE-008 variant)
AtRisk: zero progress, Cost benefit, NetUnknown — financial claim blocks OnTrack
Realized: Tier=Layer, Operational, NetNA with rationale, all gates met
Regressed: agent tier, secondary authority, stale, sustainment regressed
NotReady: empty owner, policy unresolved — security event
OnTrack: 20% progress, Proxy metric attribution, Aging freshness
Unproven: training phase, HasValueClaim=true but no evidence source
HypothesisOnly: metric ID present, baseline null — same result as GE-002
AtRisk: attribution Unknown with p>0; confidence and score both capped
Realized: Aging freshness accepted by owner (OwnerAcceptedStale=true), all other gates met
NotReady: empty value owner, tier=Layer, no sponsor
OnTrack: 80% progress, ExpertJudgement attribution (low confidence, not Realized)
AtRisk: target reached but ExpertJudgement; realizedEligible fails attribution check
Malformed: completely empty input — all defaults, no owner
